strengths: 20 years of progressive software engineering experience across full-stack, infrastructure, and multiple domains, exceeding the 15-year minimum
Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows, demonstrating active engagement with AI tooling
Proven technical leadership through organizing workshops, courses, mentoring, and building teams across multiple organizations
concerns: No demonstrated expertise building AI/ML products or platforms; current work is infrastructure-focused rather than strategic or product-oriented
Missing preferred qualification of Master's/PhD in AI-related field; education background is general Computer Science and photography
Limited evidence of advising strategic customers on technology adoption or driving organizational AI strategy initiatives
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds minimum experience requirements with 20 years of solid engineering credentials and holds an MIT degree. Current work at re:cinq on AI infrastructure and MCP tooling shows emerging AI engagement. However, the role demands Director-level expertise in AI strategy and demonstrated success building AI-powered products or platforms—areas where the resume shows infrastructure work but lacks strategic or product evidence. No Master's/PhD in AI, no customer advisory experience, and no recognized AI thought leadership create material gaps for this senior position.
